name: Neck Retraction (Chin Tuck)
instructions: Sit up straight. Gently pull your chin straight back as if making a double chin. Hold, then relax.

name: Shoulder Blade Squeezes
instructions: Sit or stand tall. Squeeze your shoulder blades together as if holding a pencil between them.

name: Clamshell Exercise
instructions: Lie on your side with knees bent at 90°. Keeping feet together, raise your top knee without rotating your pelvis.

name: Thoracic Extension Stretch
instructions: Sit in a chair. Place your hands behind your head. Gently arch your upper back over the top edge of the chair.

name: Terminal Knee Extension
instructions: Stand with a resistance band behind your knee. Slightly bend the knee, then straighten it fully against the band's resistance.
